ddls:
CREATE TABLE "tests" (
  "test_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test */,
  "test_name" TEXT /* Name of the test */,
  "test_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the test */,
  "test_version" INTEGER /* Version number of the test */,
  "test_category" TEXT /* Category of the test (e.g., Radiated Emission, Conducted Emission) */,
  "test_created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the test was created */,
  "test_updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the test was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("test_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_requirements" (
  "requirement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test requirement */,
  "test_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test this requirement belongs to */,
  "standard" TEXT /* Standard that this requirement is based on (e.g., EN 55032) */,
  "class_severity" TEXT /* Class or severity level of this requirement (e.g., Class B) */,
  "requirement_version" INTEGER /* Version number of the requirement */,
  "requirement_status" TEXT /* Status of the requirement (e.g., Active, Inactive) */,
  "requirement_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the requirement */,
  "requirement_created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the requirement was created */,
  "requirement_updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the requirement was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("requirement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_requirements_test_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_id") REFERENCES tests ("test_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_requirements_standard FOREIGN KEY ("standard") REFERENCES standards ("standard_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_methods" (
  "method_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test method */,
  "test_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test this method belongs to */,
  "method_name" TEXT /* Name of the test method */,
  "method_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the test method */,
  "method_version" INTEGER /* Version number of the method */,
  "method_status" TEXT /* Status of the method (e.g., Active, Inactive) */,
  "method_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the method */,
  "method_created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the method was created */,
  "method_updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the method was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("method_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_methods_test_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_id") REFERENCES tests ("test_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test result */,
  "test_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test this result belongs to */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the test (e.g., PASS, FAIL) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the test result */,
  "result_version" INTEGER /* Version number of the result */,
  "result_date" TEXT /* Date when the test result was recorded */,
  "result_tester_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tester who conducted the test */,
  "result_product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product being tested */,
  "result_created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the result was created */,
  "result_updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the result was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_results_test_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_id") REFERENCES tests ("test_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_results_result_tester_id FOREIGN KEY ("result_tester_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_results_result_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("result_product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "standards" (
  "standard_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each standard */,
  "standard_name" TEXT /* Name of the standard */,
  "standard_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the standard */,
  "standard_version" INTEGER /* Version number of the standard */,
  "standard_status" TEXT /* Status of the standard (e.g., Active, Inactive) */,
  "standard_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the standard */,
  "standard_created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the standard was created */,
  "standard_updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the standard was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("standard_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "product_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the product */,
  "product_version" INTEGER /* Version number of the product */,
  "product_status" TEXT /* Status of the product (e.g., Active, Inactive) */,
  "product_manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the product */,
  "product_model" TEXT /* Model number of the product */,
  "product_created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the product was created */,
  "product_updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the product was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "certificates" (
  "certificate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each certificate */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product this certificate belongs to */,
  "certificate_number" TEXT /* Certificate number */,
  "issue_date" TEXT /* Date the certificate was issued */,
  "certificate_version" INTEGER /* Version number of the certificate */,
  "certificate_status" TEXT /* Status of the certificate (e.g., Active, Inactive) */,
  "certificate_expiration_date" TEXT /* Expiration date of the certificate */,
  "certificate_issued_by" TEXT /* Entity that issued the certificate */,
  "certificate_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the certificate */,
  "certificate_created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the certificate was created */,
  "certificate_updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the certificate was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("certificate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_certificates_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "user_email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "user_role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., Test Engineer, QA, Admin) */,
  "user_password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "user_created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the user was created */,
  "user_updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the user was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_cases" (
  "test_case_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test case */,
  "test_case_name" TEXT /* Name of the test case */,
  "test_case_description" TEXT /* Description of the test case */,
  "test_case_status" TEXT /* Status of the test case (e.g., Draft, Active, Inactive) */,
  "test_case_created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the test case was created */,
  "test_case_updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the test case was last updated */,
  "test_case_product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product associated with the test case */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("test_case_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_cases_test_case_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_case_product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_case_requirements" (
  "test_case_requirement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test case requirement */,
  "test_case_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test case */,
  "requirement_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test requirement */,
  "test_case_requirement_created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the test case requirement was created */,
  "test_case_requirement_updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the test case requirement was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("test_case_requirement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_case_requirements_requirement_id FOREIGN KEY ("requirement_id") REFERENCES test_requirements ("requirement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_case_requirements_test_case_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_case_id") REFERENCES test_cases ("test_case_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_case_methods" (
  "test_case_method_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test case method */,
  "test_case_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test case */,
  "method_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test method */,
  "test_case_method_created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the test case method was created */,
  "test_case_method_updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the test case method was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("test_case_method_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_case_methods_method_id FOREIGN KEY ("method_id") REFERENCES test_methods ("method_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_case_methods_test_case_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_case_id") REFERENCES test_cases ("test_case_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_case_results" (
  "test_case_result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test case result */,
  "test_case_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test case */,
  "result_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test result */,
  "test_case_result_created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the test case result was created */,
  "test_case_result_updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the test case result was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("test_case_result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_case_results_test_case_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_case_id") REFERENCES test_cases ("test_case_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_case_results_result_id FOREIGN KEY ("result_id") REFERENCES test_results ("result_id")
)
